chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Bail Application No.S-243 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Post-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at flag (A) 2. For hearing of Bail Application 17-7-2025 Mr. Muhammad Qayyum Arain, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Mansoor Ahmed Shaikh, Deputy Prosecutor General.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing at some length, learned counsel for the applicant states that he wishes to withdraw the instant bail application as long as directions are given to the trial Court to proceed with the matter expeditiously. The instant Bail Application is dismissed as withdrawn. The learned trial Court is directed to expedite the matter and conclude the same within three months from today, failing which the applicant will be at liberty to move fresh bail application on the said ground. In addition to the above, learned counsel for the applicant is at liberty to move fresh bail application before the learned trial Court if and when the fresh ground emerges. J U D G E Naveed Ali
